meta.titleZh: 李柏億 Boyi Li — 數位行銷總監
meta.descriptionZh: 10年橫跨電商行銷、AdTech產品與數據整合的複合型主管。
meta.descriptionEn: 10 years across e-commerce marketing, AdTech products and data integration.

profile.taglineZh: 市場洞察分析到營收成長的決策與執行
profile.taglineEn: From market insight analysis to revenue growth — decision-making and execution.

paragraphsZh: 10 年橫跨電商行銷、參與與協作 MarTech 產品與數據整合。擅長從市場洞察反推商品策略，曾協助電商月營收從 1800 萬成長至 5000 萬；也能以 PM 角色推動 AI 推薦引擎與數據資產商品化。
行銷決策有數據支撐，讓數據產品有市場落地。我做的不是行銷優化，而是發現市場缺口、反推商品策略、帶動整體營收的全鏈路操盤。
paragraphsEn: 10 years across e-commerce marketing, MarTech product collaboration and data integration. Skilled at reverse-engineering product strategy from market insight — helped scale monthly revenue from NT$18M to NT$50M; drove AI recommendation engine adoption as a PM.

I make marketing data-driven and data products market-ready. What I do isn't campaign optimization — it's identifying market gaps, back-engineering product strategy, and driving full-funnel revenue growth.

experience.descZh: 規劃 YouTube 與社群內容行銷，提升品牌信任度與名單收集。建立以 LINE OA 為核心的流量池，整合社群觸點與再行銷策略。帶領 1 行銷企劃＋2 剪輯師，製作投顧內容並提升轉換率。
experience.descEn: Planned YouTube and social content marketing to build brand trust and grow lead lists. Built a LINE OA-centered traffic pool integrating social touchpoints and retargeting. Led 1 marketing planner and 2 video editors to produce financial advisory content and improve CVR.

experience.descZh: 整合四維數據（媒體標籤/零售/發票/電信）應用於 BI 戰略報表與受眾設定。帶領 5 人部門管理月投放額 500 萬元。
experience.descEn: Integrated four-dimensional data (media tag / retail / invoice / telecom) for BI strategic reports and audience targeting. Led a 5-person team managing NT$5M in monthly ad spend.

experience.descZh: 規劃 B2C 數位行銷策略。建立 GA4 事件追蹤與 GSC 分析，轉換率由 2% 提升至 3.4%，廣告流量提升約 30%。
experience.descEn: Architected B2C digital marketing strategy. Built GA4 event tracking and GSC analysis — CVR lifted from 2% to 3.4%, paid traffic up ~30%.

experience.descZh: 優化網站架構與內容策略，目標關鍵字推進至 Google 首頁。執行半年內自然流量提升達 140%。
experience.descEn: Optimized site architecture and content strategy — target keywords reached Google page 1. Organic traffic grew 140% within 6 months.

experience.descZh: 帶領商品推薦引擎迭代，應用於新聞媒體 & 電商產業。憑藉電商實戰經驗橋接工程與業務，推動 AI 產品落地。
experience.descEn: Led product recommendation engine iteration for news media and e-commerce. Bridged engineering and business using firsthand e-commerce experience to drive AI product adoption.

experience.descZh: 負責官網行銷策略與優化專案，月營收從 1800 萬成長至 5000 萬。帶領 10 人團隊規劃跨渠道廣告投放，ROAS 提升至 5 倍。
experience.descEn: Owned site marketing strategy and optimization projects. Monthly revenue grew from NT$18M to NT$50M. Led a 10-person team across multi-channel ad campaigns — ROAS improved 5×.

highlight.textZh: 透過數據發現運動族群對生鮮食品的潛在需求缺口，將行銷資源投入雞胸肉、藜麥毛豆、花椰菜米等產品，並執行素人減重挑戰活動，成就 1800萬→5000萬 的營收成長。
highlight.textEn: Identified a latent demand gap among fitness consumers for fresh food via data. Redirected marketing resources to chicken breast, quinoa edamame, and cauliflower rice — and ran an amateur weight-loss challenge campaign that drove 1800萬→5000萬 revenue growth.

experience.descZh: 操作 Facebook／Google 廣告投放，設計跨產業廣告策略。管理月預算約 300 萬元，成功拓展新客戶並提升轉換率。投放結構：70% 成效轉換、20% 品牌曝光、10% 影片互動。
experience.descEn: Managed Facebook and Google ad campaigns across industries. Handled ~NT$3M monthly budget, acquired new clients and improved CVR. Campaign mix: 70% performance, 20% brand awareness, 10% video engagement.

experience.descZh: 規劃數位行銷課程（廣告投放、社群設計、GA 全修班）。與業界講師協作設計課綱，成功舉辦 10+ 場專業課程，累積超過 2,000 名學員，提升協會影響力與專業知名度。
experience.descEn: Planned digital marketing courses (ad campaigns, social design, GA bootcamp). Co-designed curricula with industry speakers — hosted 10+ sessions, reached 2,000+ learners.
